idea-plugin.name: Erik's Theme
idea-plugin.description:
A personal theme for JetBrains IDEs

Erik's Theme is a custom theme inspired by Catppuccin, tailored for a comfortable coding experience in JetBrains Rider and other JetBrains IDEs. It includes a light and dark variant, plus a warm "Summer Refresh" light variant, all targeting the Islands UI.

Variants

  • Erik's theme (light) — A warm, blue-tinted light theme
  • Erik's theme (dark) — A comfortable dark theme
  • Erik's Summer Refresh — A warm, sandy light theme with summer tones

Usage

  • Head to Settings → Appearance & Behaviour → Appearance
  • Select Erik's theme (light), Erik's theme (dark), or Erik's Summer Refresh
  • (Optional) Restart your IDE

Help

  • GitHub Repository
  • Issue Tracker
